hook: I built a *content engine* that prints reel ideas every morning
hook_sub: two skills, one notion db, eight minutes a day.
stakes: Most builders are still *typing prompts* one at a time.
system_oneliner: One scrapes the internet for what's working. The other turns each signal into a reel package.

steps.title: *Scrape* every morning
steps.body: **v2-signal** pulls every viral AI reel from 12 handles overnight and dumps them into Notion.

steps.title: *Score* the winners
steps.body: Each reel gets a **threat-match** + **tool-demo** score. The top 3 surface in a daily digest.

steps.title: *Write* the package
steps.body: **v2-write** drafts caption + capcut-lines + SCRIPT.md in my voice. I review and film.

payoff: 10 minutes of curation *replaces* 4 hours of ideation.
cta_body: I'll send the full Notion schema, both skill prompts, and the scoring rubric. Free.
